query:
SELECT hp.*, u.name as corretor_nome 
FROM historicoPresenca hp 
LEFT JOIN users u ON hp.corretorId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%' 
ORDER BY hp.dataHora DESC 
LIMIT 10;
